biography: Building the future, one brick at a time.

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
We can almost hear the Yuletide cheer 🔔 Just in time to enjoy this Brickfilm and soak in the festivities.
 
🎥 @the_little_brick1, @oscar_momo, SPELBRICKS, @mega_space_fighter, BricksPlanet 
 
#LEGO #WinterVillage #BrickFilm #Holidays

Obi-Wan has got the perfect holiday gift for Darth Vader, but it might not be what he wished for.

 #LEGO #LEGOStarWars

When the LEGO Star Wars characters gather to celebrate Life Day, Rey discovers the greatest gift of all – a key to the galaxy’s past. So begins a thrilling journey across time and space during which she meets her Master, her Master’s Master, her Master’s father, her Master’s father’s Master and many more of your favorite characters! So, grab yourself a box of popcorn, a carton of blue milk, get comfy and follow her on an epic time-travelling adventure in the LEGO Star Wars Holiday Special streaming now on Disney+!
It’s time to celebrate… Dragon Era Day 🥳
latestIgtvVideos.title: Ready for a new holiday? We asked some kids to invent one!

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Our Leicester Square Store in London has had a makeover. ✨ Fancy taking a look at our biggest store yet? 👀

latestPosts.caption:
Got questions about LEGO® STAR WARS™ SMART PLAY™? @markhamill is standing by to take your call! 📞 Just dial 1-877-80-ASK-MARK from 9AM-5PM PT this Wednesday, April 8th and select lucky callers within the US will learn from Mark about how the galaxy plays back!

#LEGO #StarWars #LEGOStarWars #TheGalaxyPlaysBack

The galaxy plays back. 💫

The LEGO® STAR WARS™ SMART PLAY™ Experience has landed.

#starwars #legostarwars #thegalaxyplaysback

Hold on to your straw hats, we're sailing into the Grand Line 🏴‍☠️☠️
#LEGOOnePiece #ONEPIECE

A once-in-a-lifetime build: Assembling a LEGO Speed Champions BUGATTI, while @brunospengler_eb drives at full speed around Circuit de l'Anneau du Rhin. 

#LEGODreamRides #ClickClickVroom #LEGOSpeedChampions #BUGATTI
